project_name: GESP 题型分类与知识点对齐网站
_milestone_schema: { id, name, type: 'standard'|'adhoc', status, phases[], phase_slugs{}, roadmap_ref, created_at }

key_decisions: 分类目录优先，不做搜索页优先。
官方来源决定等级和官方知识点范围。
MVP 先聚焦 C++ 五级。
动态规划不属于 GESP 五级核心分类。
Phase 1 source registry is metadata-first and stores no full problem statements.
Phase 2 official source ingestion stores metadata-only official HTML/PDF discovery results and no full HTML or PDF bodies.
Official ingestion currently discovers 180 official documents, including 165 PDFs, 10 true-question sessions, and 15 sample attachments.
后端服务、数据库、队列、检索服务和离线解析依赖可以使用 Docker 容器。
后续页面前端使用 React；后端服务优先使用 Nest；数据库使用 MySQL。
Phase 3 official PDF parser stores structured metadata and short evidence snippets only; full PDF text is not persisted.
Latest official true-question PDF parsing produced 216 C++ problem records across 8 C++ PDFs, including 27 C++ level 5 records.

Phase 4 OJ mirror ingestion now includes Luogu CCF GESP C++ level training lists 551-558 and produces 545 secondary entries, including 432 Luogu entries, 24 zqiceberg entries, 7 selected mirror entries, 106 GitHub C++ reference entries, and 199 duplicate candidates after OJ-ID title normalization.
GitHub jonaslgtm/gesp-exam-questions is an auxiliary题库参考源 only; only C++ metadata is consumed and Python/Scratch/图形化 paths are excluded.
Phase 5 canonical alignment produced 216 C++ canonical problem records, 18 secondary source versions, 44 duplicate candidates, 1 conflict candidate, and a 27-row C++ level 5 canonical table.
Official PDF parser is now official-pdf-parser-v2; it fixes programming title extraction when PDF text order places previous reference code before the next title.

Phase 6 level/domain classification produced 216 C++ classification records, all 27 C++ level-5 records have official level labels, 24 level-5 records have domain candidates, and 16/16 programming records have domain candidates.
Level-5 DP remains disallowed as an exact/core domain; Phase 6 validation asserts zero exact DP level-5 domain labels.

Phase 7 problem type and knowledge extraction produced 216 C++ records, 21/27 C++ level-5 problems with problem type candidates, 21/27 with knowledge point candidates, 54 problem type tags, 80 knowledge point tags, and a 10-domain C++ level-5 taxonomy.
Phase 7 extraction uses original source text and explicit title overrides only; it does not use derived algorithm-domain labels to infer problem types or knowledge points.
Phase 8 conflict/confidence model produced 216 display records, 258 scored tags, 1 source conflict, 44 source duplicate candidates, and 69 review queue items.
M3 Classification Engine is completed; M4 Classified Catalog UI is active and should build React catalog routes on top of the generated classification data.
M4 catalog app now uses React + Nest + MySQL Docker; API reads MySQL first and falls back to JSON only when MySQL is unavailable.

Problem answer guidance has 216 records: 120 official selection answers, 16 official programming AI sample-verified answers marked needs_review, and 80 judgment answers marked needs_review; every record includes Chinese understanding examples and comments.

Problem detail model has 216 records and MySQL problem_details support; the React detail panel shows answers, knowledge explanations, option status, visual asset status, programming-solution status, and source links.

Official PDF option extraction now uses cross-page question blocks; 97/120 selection problems have source-extracted A/B/C/D options and the remaining 23 keep A/B/C/D needs_review slots, so no official selection detail has an empty option array.

Official PDF visual asset extraction now stores cropped PDF image/code regions only, not full pages: 218 official PDF visual assets cover 100 problems; combined official details have 101 source-extracted visual-asset records and 219 assets after including the existing public OJ image, with 115 records marked none_found and 0 pending visual asset collection.
Official programming enrichment now uses public Luogu pages for the 16 official C++ programming problems; all 16 have source-extracted statements and samples, and 1 statement image was detected.

Official programming AI reference solution enrichment now adds 16 ai_generated_sample_verified C++ solutions with Chinese comments; all passed current public samples and remain needs_review with visible AI-generated甄别提示。

Official programming classification refinement now updates 16 official programming records based on source-extracted OJ statements plus sample-verified AI C++ solutions; tags remain needs_review and level-5 exact DP remains zero.

Supplemental C++ problem bank now has 195 deduplicated public OJ single-problem records and 400 supplemental source versions after excluding one official-title duplicate and adding Luogu CCF GESP C++ level training lists; all supplemental learning aids remain ai_generated_learning_aid and needs_review.

Public OJ detail enrichment now has a low-frequency no-login crawler; current batches extracted 170 statements and 170 sample groups across level 1, level 2, all 25 level-3 supplemental records, all 26 level-4 supplemental records, all 26 level-5 supplemental records, all 22 level-6 supplemental records, and 15 level-7 supplemental records, with 5 applied source-extracted OJ images and source_terms_status needs_review. Level-5 now includes public Xinchuan/Aijie OJ pages for 巧夺大奖、烹饪问题、小杨的幸运数字、平均分配; the latest level-7 batch adds 武器购买、燃烧、图上移动、等价消除、线图.

AI-generated C++ reference solutions are allowed only with explicit ai_generated_sample_verified origin, Chinese comments, sample verification, visible AI-generated甄别提示, and needs_review answer status; current batches add 186 such solutions across official and supplemental records.

If answers, images, explanations, or other detail assets cannot be collected from public official/OJ/reference sources, AI-generated fallback content is allowed only when clearly marked as AI-generated, needs_review, and requiring user甄别; it must not be presented as official source material.

Supplemental classification refinement now updates 170 source-extracted problems using public statements plus sample-verified AI C++ solutions; refined tags remain needs_review and use source_extracted_statement_ai_solution_review. Current level-1, level-2, level-3, level-4, level-5, level-6, and first 15 level-7 enriched records are classified for the collected records.
After current app/data tasks are complete, expand the GESP C++ problem bank by crawling/collecting more sources and importing them into MySQL.

Catalog CRUD is now implemented for MySQL-backed user-maintained problems: create/update/delete supports title, level, question type, tags, statement, choice options, samples, visual asset URLs, source links, reference answer, explanation, and C++ reference solution; user-maintained content remains needs_review.

React detail pane now scrolls to the top when selecting a problem, and the editor pane scrolls into view for create/edit flows; browser verification covered create, edit, delete, options, samples, images, source links, and C++ reference solution display.

Next public OJ enrichment planning now writes data/enrichment/next-public-oj-targets.json; current supplemental bank has 195 records, 170 source-extracted, 25 remaining with public URLs, and the default next batch selects the remaining 5 level-7 plus 20 level-8 targets.

Review closure remains required: plan:review-workqueue writes data/classification/review-workqueue-plan.json with 1363 open review work items, including 52 high-priority items. needs_review records must be deliberately reviewed before being promoted.
deferred: 完整题面存储需要版权或来源条款确认。
是否首版支持 Python 五级留到扩展里程碑。
是否开放教师后台需要在 Review Workflow 里进一步确认。
当前 M4 收尾完成后再执行 GESP C++ 题库扩充采集，不在本轮启动爬虫或登录洛谷。
持续优化题库分类时，需要优先补齐选择题选项、题目图片资产、编程题 C++ 参考解和低置信度标签复核。
完成最终目标前必须持续收敛 data/classification/review-workqueue-plan.json 中的复核项，不能把 needs_review 当作已确认。
